message:
feat(pager,core,vdbe): true read-only pager fast path, prepared UPDATE/DELETE fast-path metadata caching, VDBE cold-state tracking

Read-only pager fast path:
- Add SimplePager::open_readonly_with_cx() that opens the database file
  with READONLY VFS flags, skips journal recovery and freelist traversal,
  making opening even multi-gigabyte databases near-instantaneous
- Add VfsOpenFlags::READONLY flag constant
- Add PagerBackend::open_readonly() that routes to the read-only pager
  across all platform VFS backends (IoUring, Unix, Windows)
- Wire open_schema_only to use the read-only pager path instead of
  the full read-write open

Prepared UPDATE/DELETE fast-path metadata caching:
- Add PreparedUpdateDeleteFastPath struct that captures fast-path
  eligibility metadata (kind, constraint violation behavior, static
  fallback reason, foreign key work flag) at prepare time instead of
  re-scanning the AST and schema on every execution
- Add prepared_update_fast_path_metadata() and
  prepared_delete_fast_path_metadata() builders
- Factor per-execution dispatch from two large match arms into a single
  fast_path.supports_direct_dispatch_now() check that only re-evaluates
  the dynamic foreign-key pragma, not all static conditions
- Add test verifying DELETE fast path dynamically rechecks PRAGMA
  foreign_keys across executions

VDBE cold-state tracking:
- Add StatementColdState bitflag tracking which expensive subsystems
  (aggregates, conflict tracking, rowsets, sequence counters, vtab
  cursors, window contexts, register subtypes, bloom filters) were
  actually touched during statement execution
- Replace blanket clear of all cold collections on reset with selective
  clear of only the subsystems that were marked dirty, so common-case
  simple statements (INSERT/SELECT) skip clearing unused collections
- Mark cold state on vtab cursor registration and other subsystem
  entry points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
